title: 10 Pcs A4 Opaque Rigid Plastic Sheets - 0.5mm Thick Textured Blue PVC, 297x210mm for Craft, Laser Cutting, Office Signage
features: 【Premium Rigid Material】Made from 0.5mm thick durable PVC , these opaque plastic sheets are stiff yet easy to cut with scissors or craft knives. Textured surface enhances adhesion for paints, markers, and glue—ideal for signage, stencils, or model building without peeling.

【Precision A4 Size (297x210mm)】Standard A4 dimensions (297mm x 210mm) fit seamlessly into UK office folders, laminators, and laser cutters. Ideal for professional documents, school projects, or DIY crafts requiring exact sizing.

【Multi-Purpose Opaque Finish】The non-translucent white/coloured surface ensures clear visibility for writing, printing, or painting . Use for notice boards, menu cards, or custom art with no bleed-through.
【10-Pack Value Set】10 sheets per pack provides ample supply for bulk projects, classroom activities, or small business needs. Save costs compared to single-piece purchases.
【UK-Friendly Applications】Widely used in British schools, offices, and workshops for name badges, plant labels, laser cutting templates, and hobby crafts . Compatible with most printers and markers.
description: Product Description Precision A4 Size (297mm x 210mm) Why Choose Our Plastic Sheets? Textured for better adhesion – No peeling or smudging Sturdy yet easy to cut – Works with scissors, craft knives, and laser cutters A4 size compatibility – Fits UK office and school supplies 10 sheets per pack – Great value for bulk projects
